summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of PT. Intercloud Digital Inovasi landing page. Verified SEO/meta/JSON-LD, header logo & nav, hero, features (4), all 8 service cards + modal (open/close via X, Escape, outside click), Dedicated Server modal content (signals & use-cases), Decision Guide 3 cards, Pricing 3 plans, Partners marquee, FAQ accordion (9 items, single-open), CTA contact cards, Footer, Floating WhatsApp, responsive layout at 375/768/1920. All 11 wa.me links point to 6287812397187 with target=_blank. No console/page errors.

services.note: Review request text mentioned '9 service cards' but the id list shows 8 - only 8 exist in data.js and 8 render (correct).

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: In CTA.jsx the address contact card uses href='#' which navigates to top of page when clicked; consider href='https://maps.google.com/...' (Menara Cakrawala) or removing anchor wrapping (kept as-is; not a blocker).

Minor: Review request stated 9 service cards but data.js defines exactly 8 (cloud, hosting, vps, colocation, dedicated, lease, firewall, dcinterconnect). All 8 render correctly. This appears to be a typo in the review request, not a code issue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All landing-page flows verified end-to-end. Frontend-only site; no backend. WhatsApp number 6287812397187 is used consistently across all 11 wa.me links (Header, Hero, Services modals, Decision Guide, Pricing, FAQ, CTA, Footer, Floating). No console errors. Responsive tested at 375/768/1920.
